{{Quote|Drybal, if you speak again I shall order you to shoot yourself in the foot. Is that clear?|[[Raze (criminal)|Raze]] warns Drybal|<ref name="Rebellion 6">[[Rebellion 6|''Rebellion'' 6]]</ref>}}
'''Drybal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yarkora/Legends|Yarkora]] employed by [[Raze's organization|Raze's criminal organization]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Though Drybal had worked for him for least five years and was considered him to be one of his closest lieutenants, [[Raze (criminal)|Raze]] did not appear to particularly value Drybal's input. Drybal's chief responsibility in Raze's organization was to sort out the streams of data that Raze's vast network of [[Spy/Legends|spies]] transmitted to Raze's headquarters on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Per Lupelo]].<ref name="Rebellion 2">[[Rebellion 2|''Rebellion'' 2]]</ref>

When [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] spy [[Wyl Tarson]] attempted to escape from Per Lupelo, Raze ordered Drybal to apprehend Tarson. Drybal and a posse eventually caught up to Tarson but never got beyond delivering some choice words before Tarson [[Stun/Legends|stunned]] them. However, Raze had made other contingencies and Tarson ultimately failed to escape.<ref name="Rebellion 6" />
